description: You are a mission architect designing a J2-invariant relative "helix" orbit for a tandem Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) mission. Using the specifications in ~/Desktop/sar_formation_specs.txt, calculate the Eccentricity and RAAN offsets for a Deputy satellite to achieve a 500m radial and 2500m cross-track baseline relative to the Chief. Create and run a GMAT simulation for 7 days using an Earth J2 propagator (Degree=2, Order=0). The Deputy must share the Chief's Semi-Major Axis and Inclination, with both having Argument of Perigee and True Anomaly at 0.0 degrees. Save the GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/tandem_formation.script and generate a report at ~/GMAT_output/formation_state.txt containing exactly these columns: Chief.ElapsedDays, Chief.EarthMJ2000Eq.X, Chief.EarthMJ2000Eq.Y, Chief.EarthMJ2000Eq.Z, Deputy.EarthMJ2000Eq.X, Deputy.EarthMJ2000Eq.Y, Deputy.EarthMJ2000Eq.Z. Login: username=ga, password=password123
